name: fuel_inventory
description: a power-plant fuel-inventory world with reorder; actions burn, reorder, ration

card.description: a power-plant fuel-inventory world with reorder; actions burn, reorder, ration

rules: `fuel` is the stockpile in tons and is always clamped to [0, capacity]; it can never go negative or exceed capacity.
`burn` consumes fuel to make power: it burns `demand` tons (or `ration_factor * demand` while rationing) and adds `energy_per_ton` MWh per ton burned to `power`.
If the stockpile cannot cover the wanted burn, the plant burns whatever fuel remains and increments `shortfalls` to record the brownout.

`reorder` places a single fixed delivery of `reorder_qty` tons that arrives after `lead_time` slots; it is ignored while an order is already in flight, and bills `unit_cost` per ton to cumulative `cost`.
A delivery in flight counts down `eta` by one each slot and is added to `fuel` (clamped to capacity) when `eta` reaches zero.
`ration` toggles conservation mode, trading output for endurance by cutting subsequent burns to `ration_factor` of demand.
`reorder_point` is an advisory threshold: reorder before `fuel` falls below it (accounting for lead time) to avoid shortfalls.
Every action advances `t` by one slot.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name", "burn")

    fuel = float(s.get("fuel", 0.0))
    cap = float(s.get("capacity", 0.0))
    demand = float(s.get("demand", 0.0))
    ration_factor = float(s.get("ration_factor", 1.0))
    rationed = bool(s.get("rationed", False))
    reorder_qty = float(s.get("reorder_qty", 0.0))
    lead_time = int(s.get("lead_time", 0))
    pending = float(s.get("pending", 0.0))
    eta = int(s.get("eta", 0))
    unit_cost = float(s.get("unit_cost", 0.0))
    cost = float(s.get("cost", 0.0))
    power = float(s.get("power", 0.0))
    energy_per_ton = float(s.get("energy_per_ton", 1.0))
    shortfalls = int(s.get("shortfalls", 0))

    # 1) Receive a delivery that lands this slot: an in-flight order's eta counts
    #    down each step and the fuel arrives (clamped to capacity) when it hits 0.
    if eta > 0:
        eta -= 1
        if eta == 0 and pending > 0.0:
            fuel = min(cap, fuel + pending)
            pending = 0.0

    # 2) Apply the chosen action.
    if name == "burn":
        # Burn to meet demand (cut to ration_factor of demand while rationing).
        # If the stockpile cannot cover it, burn what is left and log a shortfall.
        want = demand * ration_factor if rationed else demand
        burned = want if want <= fuel else fuel
        if burned < want:
            shortfalls += 1
        fuel -= burned
        power += burned * energy_per_ton
    elif name == "reorder":
        # Place a fixed replenishment order, but only when none is already in
        # flight; it arrives after `lead_time` slots and bills unit_cost per ton.
        if eta == 0 and pending == 0.0:
            pending = reorder_qty
            eta = lead_time
            cost += unit_cost * reorder_qty
    elif name == "ration":
        # Toggle conservation mode: cuts future burn to ration_factor of demand.
        rationed = not rationed

    s["t"] = int(s.get("t", 0)) + 1
    s["fuel"] = round(fuel, 6)
    s["pending"] = round(pending, 6)
    s["eta"] = eta
    s["cost"] = round(cost, 6)
    s["power"] = round(power, 6)
    s["shortfalls"] = shortfalls
    s["rationed"] = rationed
    s["last_action"] = name
    return s

emit.report: t={t}: fuel={fuel} tons | incoming in {eta} | power={power} MWh | cost=${cost} | shortfalls={shortfalls}
